headline: AUDIT YOUR SUPPLIERS BY RISK
subheading: Design a risk-tiered, MHRA-ready supplier audit programme that closes the loop from risk to CAPA.
flux_prompt: Abstract editorial illustration of a risk-based supplier audit programme as an interconnected governance system, set against a deep navy background. A glowing teal and cyan network of nodes representing suppliers, arranged in three luminous tiers from a dense critical core outward to lighter satellites, each node ringed by concentric assurance halos. Translucent layered glass panels suggest a multi-year audit schedule and a risk-tiering matrix, with a continuous cyan loop flowing through the nodes to imply a closed cycle from risk assessment to corrective action and re-evaluation. Subtle emerald-green accent points mark verified, closed findings, while soft geometric grids and faint stainless-steel reflective surfaces evoke a clinical pharmaceutical setting. Calm, methodical, premium clinical-luxury mood, sophisticated depth with shallow focus, glowing connective lines and crisp precision detailing. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
